title: Call Of Duty in MC
description: This project adds guns, COD maps, and more to make Minecraft an FPS based on Call Of Duty Black Ops 6.
body:
My modpack, Call of Duty in Minecraft, was designed to make Minecraft feel like a COD game, with all of the guns, maps and multiplayer. It also includes zombies, but you must download the specific Zombies profile in the downloads section, because some users may want it to be separate, which will come soon.

Features: 
- Lots of guns from Point Blanc and Guns++
- Custom Maps from COD games, such as Nuketown and Hijacked. 
- Heaps of fun while playing, recommmended to be played with others. 
- Zombie mode with the zombie version(coming soon!)


If you like having fun with friends in Minecraft in the BO6 maps, this is the pack for you. 



Maps by these people: 
https://www.planetminecraft.com/project/cod-bo2-hijacked-recreation-amp-pvp-map-1-21-download
https://www.planetminecraft.com/project/call-of-duty-summit-6304540
https://www.planetminecraft.com/project/cod-boii-overflow-recreation-amp-pvp-map-1-20
https://www.planetminecraft.com/project/call-of-duty-nuketown-fully-functional-playable-in-vanilla-minecraft
